x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Project financial data enables Now Assist SPM to provide AI-driven budget variance analysis and cost optimization recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure project budgets with a planned cost greater than zero. Link projects to financial plans and track actuals. Target: 70%+ of active projects with cost data. Now Assist SPM uses cost data for AI ROI analysis.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_07f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c06
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Project financial data enables Now Assist SPM to provide AI-driven budget variance analysis and cost optimization recommendations.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Project Financial Tracking</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('pm_project');
    gaTotal.addQuery('active', true);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No active projects found',
            finding: 'No active projects on this instance. Financial tracking cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaWithCost = new GlideAggregate('pm_project');
    gaWithCost.addQuery('active', true);
    gaWithCost.addQuery('planned_cost', '>', 0);
    gaWithCost.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaWithCost.query();
    var withCost = gaWithCost.next() ? parseInt(gaWithCost.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((withCost / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of active projects have planned cost (' + withCost + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 70) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active projects have planned cost data. Now Assist SPM can provide AI-driven financial optimization and budget variance analysis.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 40) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of active projects have planned cost (target: 70%). Now Assist SPM budget variance analysis will have gaps for unfunded projects.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: (total - withCost) + ' active projects missing planned cost data (' + pct + '% populated). Now Assist SPM cannot perform meaningful AI budget variance or ROI analysis without financial data.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>SPM</module><number>CHK0000472</number><order>60</order><remediation_guidance>Configure project budgets with a planned cost greater than zero. Link projects to financial plans and track actuals. Target: 70%+ of active projects with cost data. Now Assist SPM uses cost data for AI ROI analysis.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>07f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c06</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Project Financial Tracking</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_07f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c06</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
